author: O22C
content: Plan: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml with one workflow named 'CI', three parallel jobs (test, clippy, fmt) on ubuntu-latest. Pin toolchain to 1.87 via dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable with toolchain: '1.87'. Use Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 for caching. Triggers: push (main only), pull_request (any). Steps: actions/checkout@v4, dtolnay/rust-toolchain (with components per job: clippy/rustfmt as needed), Swatinem/rust-cache@v2, then the cargo command. Add CI badge to README pointing to actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg.
